description: Complete the remote agent feature: cross-session output routing, SpacetimeDB inference gateway wiring, ADR review agent, and production hardening.

A.name: Cross-Session Output Routing (BLOCKER)
A.description: Agent stream_chunks reach the agent's chat session but don't forward to the requesting client's session. This is the last gap for end-to-end remote agent UX.

steps.title: Add agent output relay in chat handler — forward stream_chunk/tool_call/tool_result from agent session to requesting session
steps.notes: When a chat_message is broadcast to agent:broadcast:input with a sourceSessionId, the agent's response events should be relayed back to that source session's topic. Add sourceSessionId to the broadcast payload, then have the agent's chat handler tag output events with it.

steps.title: Update test to use longer timeout (10 min) and verify stream_chunk receipt
steps.notes: Use qwen3.5:9b for faster response. Pre-warm model with curl to Ollama before test.

steps.title: Dashboard: show remote agent responses in chat view regardless of session
steps.notes: Subscribe to agent:*:output in the React chat component. Display stream_chunks as they arrive.

B.name: SpacetimeDB Inference Gateway (Phase 6)
B.description: Wire hex-agent's IInferencePort through SpacetimeDB reducers instead of direct Ollama/Anthropic calls. Enables nexus-managed inference routing.

steps.title: Implement SpacetimeInferenceAdapter.complete() — call request_inference reducer, poll for response
steps.notes: Replace the Phase 6 stub. Call nexus HTTP API POST /api/inference/request, poll GET /api/inference/response/{id} until complete. Timeout 5 min.

steps.title: Implement SpacetimeInferenceAdapter.stream() — SSE or WS streaming from inference gateway
steps.notes: Streaming is harder — either use SSE from nexus or subscribe to SpacetimeDB response table for incremental updates.

steps.title: Add inference provider auto-registration — when agent starts with --provider ollama, register the Ollama endpoint in SpacetimeDB
steps.notes: On agent startup, call register_provider reducer with Ollama URL + available models. Nexus can then route inference requests to this agent's Ollama.

steps.title: Wire SpacetimeInferenceAdapter into agent composition root when hub-connected
steps.notes: When --hub-url is set and inference gateway is reachable, use SpacetimeInferenceAdapter as primary LLM instead of direct Ollama/Anthropic. Falls back to direct provider if gateway unavailable.

C.name: ADR Review Agent (ADR-041)
C.description: Autonomous agent that validates new ADRs against all existing ones for scope conflicts, architectural drift, and stale references.

steps.title: Create IAdrReviewPort trait and domain types (ReviewFinding, Severity, ReviewVerdict)
Implement AdrReviewAdapter — filesystem scan + LLM-powered semantic comparison
steps.notes: 5 checks: scope conflict, architectural drift, supersession chain, stale references, metadata validation. Uses IInferencePort for semantic comparison.

steps.title: Add hex adr review CLI command
steps.notes: hex adr review [ADR-040] — review specific or all. --strict for CI. --fix for auto-fix metadata.

steps.title: Create adr-reviewer agent definition
steps.notes: Agent definition for Claude Code integration. Triggers on ADR file changes.

D.name: Production Hardening
D.description: Resilience, security, and UX improvements for remote agents.

steps.title: Auto-reconnect spawned agents on tunnel drop
steps.notes: When heartbeat monitor detects dead spawned agent, re-run spawn_remote_full with stored config. Max 3 attempts.

steps.title: Secrets forwarding over SSH tunnel (T3-2 from original workplan)
steps.notes: Forward ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and other secrets to remote agents via encrypted SSH channel. Per-session scoped, revoked on disconnect.

steps.title: hex agent status command — detailed agent view with tunnel health and task history
steps.notes: Shows tunnel health (connected/degraded/disconnected), last heartbeat, uptime, tasks completed, models available.

steps.title: Dashboard RemoteAgentPanel — React component showing fleet status
steps.notes: T4-2 from original workplan. SpacetimeDB subscriptions for real-time agent status.

steps.title: Nexus bind address — add --bind 0.0.0.0 flag for direct network access (alternative to SSH tunnel)
steps.notes: Default stays 127.0.0.1. --bind 0.0.0.0 enables direct access from LAN. Document security implications.

executionOrder: A (P0 — cross-session routing is the blocker for usable remote agents)
B-1, B-3 in parallel (inference gateway basics)
C-1, C-2 in parallel with B (ADR review is independent)
B-2, B-4 (streaming + wiring after basics work)
C-3, C-4 (CLI + agent def after core review logic)
D-1 through D-5 (hardening, can be done incrementally)
successCriteria: hex agent spawn-remote gary@bazzite.local → agent responds to chat in <30s (with warm model)
Stream chunks visible in both CLI test and dashboard
hex adr review ADR-040 produces a findings report
Agent auto-reconnects after tunnel drop within 60s
Inference routed through SpacetimeDB when available, direct fallback when not
